LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_NoGate: No active Great Infernal Gate was found for dominion slice generation.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_NoPawns: Select at least one colonist on the current map before opening a dominion slice.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_AlreadyOpe: A dominion slice is already active for this map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_NoGenerato: No pocket map generator could be resolved for the dominion slice runtime.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_MapCreate: The dominion slice could not be generated.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_NoEntryCel: No valid entry cell could be found inside the dominion slice.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_NoSession: No dominion slice session is linked to this command.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_NoSourceMa: The source colony map for this dominion slice could not be resolved.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_NoPocketMa: The dominion slice map could not be resolved.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_NoPlayerPa: No player pawns remain inside this dominion slice.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeOpened: Dominion slice runtime opened. Strike team inserted: {0}. Pocket size: {1}x{2}.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeCollapsed: The temporary dominion slice has collapsed.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeCommand_ReturnD: Return all player pawns currently inside this dominion slice to the source colony map and collapse the temporary runtime map.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeExitInspect_Unl: This extraction anchor is no longer linked to a live dominion slice session.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionPocketRuntimeFail_Environmen: The dominion slice environment could not be stabilized.
